## Claims

1. P0-4 status updated from TODO to DONE with commit SHA 16b1c97
2. P0-1 status updated from PARTIAL to DONE now that P0-4 completes propagation
3. No existing tests were modified or deleted during this change.
4. functional_prefixes string value now falls back to defaults instead of character-splitting via tuple()
5. Added isinstance check for list/tuple before tuple() conversion
6. Moved aiv.lib.config import to top of auditor.py for E402 compliance
7. Wrapped long docstring lines in _is_functional_path for E501 compliance
8. Restored Path import inside TYPE_CHECKING block for TC003 compliance
9. Consolidated and moved aiv.lib.config import to top of pre_commit.py
10. Moved aiv.lib.config import to top of pre_push.py and wrapped E501 docstring
11. Applied ruff 0.15.0 format to match CI environment
12. SVP probe finding: string value for functional_prefixes should fall back to defaults, not character-split
